# Wikipedia: List of Tor Onion Services

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED CONTENT — sourced from Wikipedia -->
<!--
  Manually derived from the Wikipedia article "List of Tor onion services".
  Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Tor_onion_services

  Editorial choices made when adapting from Wikipedia:
  - Defunct entries removed throughout (per user request).
  - Commerce section omitted: all entries were defunct (Silk Road, AlphaBay, etc.).
  - Financial section omitted: all surviving entries used deprecated V2 addresses only.
  - Pornography section omitted: included CSAM-related sites (all defunct, but
    referencing them by name is inappropriate regardless); Pornhub (not defunct)
    excluded as irrelevant to OAK's privacy/circumvention mission.
  - Social media: 8chan and Kiwifarms excluded (non-defunct per Wikipedia, but are
    harassment-enabling platforms with no privacy or circumvention relevance).
  - Note: Wikipedia lists services *known to have* onion addresses, not the raw
    .onion URLs themselves. Clearnet URLs are linked here; find actual onion addresses
    via each service's own website or the real-world-onion-sites directory.
-->

> **Source:** This page is derived from the Wikipedia article
> [List of Tor onion services](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Tor_onion_services),
> licensed [CC BY-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/).
> Defunct services have been removed. For the full, unfiltered list see the Wikipedia article.

> **Disclaimer:** While every effort is made to include only legitimate, established
> websites in this directory, Open Access Kit cannot be responsible for the content
> of third-party onion sites. Use your judgement and stay safe.

---

## Archive, Index and Torrent

| Service | Notes |
|---------|-------|
| [archive.today](https://archive.ph) | Web archiving site that saves snapshots on demand, founded 2012 |
| [Demonoid](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Demonoid) | BitTorrent tracker |
| [Internet Archive](https://archive.org) | Non-profit digital library and web archiving service |
| [The Pirate Bay](https://thepiratebay.org) | BitTorrent index |
| [Z-Library](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Z-Library) | Shadow library; many instances exist |

## Communications

| Service | Notes |
|---------|-------|
| [Briar](https://briarproject.org) | Secure messaging app; uses onion services as address when message medium is internet |
| [Keybase](https://keybase.io) | Key directory and encrypted communications platform |
| [Libera Chat](https://libera.chat) | IRC network |
| [Mailbox.org](https://mailbox.org) | Privacy-focused email provider |
| [OpenPGP](https://www.openpgp.org) | Open standard for encrypted communications |
| [Proton Mail](https://proton.me/mail) | Encrypted email service |
| [Ricochet](https://www.ricochet.im) | Secure instant messaging; uses Tor network by default |
| [Riseup](https://riseup.net) | Privacy-focused email and communications provider for activists |

## Educational

| Service | Notes |
|---------|-------|
| [HackThisSite](https://www.hackthissite.org) | Legal free training ground for hackers |

## Events

| Service | Notes |
|---------|-------|
| [DEF CON](https://defcon.org) | Annual hacker convention |
| [DebConf](https://debconf.org) | Annual Debian developer conference |

## File Storage

| Service | Notes |
|---------|-------|
| [Proton Drive](https://proton.me/drive) | Encrypted cloud storage |

## Government

| Service | Notes |
|---------|-------|
| [Central Intelligence Agency](https://www.cia.gov) | Official CIA onion site for secure contact and tip submission |

## Hosting, Infrastructure and VPN

| Service | Notes |
|---------|-------|
| [1.1.1.1 / Cloudflare](https://one.one.one.one) | DNS resolver by Cloudflare |
| [AirVPN](https://airvpn.org) | VPN provider based in Italy |
| [Certbot](https://certbot.eff.org) | Free SSL certificate tool by EFF |
| [Cryptostorm](https://cryptostorm.is) | VPN provider based in Iceland |
| [Mullvad](https://mullvad.net) | VPN provider based in Sweden |
| [Njalla](https://njal.la) | Domain registration, hosting and VPN provider |
| [The Hidden Wiki](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Hidden_Wiki) | Directory of onion services (note: multiple forks exist) |

## News and Document Archives

| Service | Notes |
|---------|-------|
| [BBC News](https://www.bbc.com) | UK public broadcaster |
| [Bellingcat](https://www.bellingcat.com) | Investigative journalism and open-source intelligence |
| [Current Time TV](https://www.currenttime.tv) | Russian-language news service (RFE/RL and Voice of America) |
| [Deutsche Welle](https://www.dw.com) | German international broadcaster |
| [Die Tageszeitung (taz)](https://taz.de) | German daily newspaper |
| [It's Going Down](https://itsgoingdown.org) | Anarchist and anti-fascist news and media |
| [ProPublica](https://www.propublica.org) | Investigative journalism nonprofit |
| [Radio Free Europe / Radio Liberty](https://www.rferl.org) | Independent news for countries with restricted media |
| [Shahada News Agency](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shahada_News_Agency) | News agency |
| [The Guardian](https://www.theguardian.com) | UK national newspaper |
| [The Intercept](https://theintercept.com) | Investigative journalism focused on national security and surveillance |
| [Voice of America](https://www.voanews.com) | US international broadcaster |

## Nonprofit Organizations

| Service | Notes |
|---------|-------|
| [Amnesty International](https://www.amnesty.org) | Global human rights organization |
| [Electronic Frontier Foundation](https://www.eff.org) | Digital rights and civil liberties nonprofit |
| [FragDenStaat](https://fragdenstaat.de) | German freedom-of-information platform |
| [Freedom of the Press Foundation](https://freedom.press) | Supports free press and protects journalists |
| [Front Line Defenders](https://www.frontlinedefenders.org) | Protects human rights defenders at risk |
| [Privacy International](https://privacyinternational.org) | Challenges surveillance and advocates for privacy rights |
| [The Tor Project](https://www.torproject.org) | Develops and maintains the Tor anonymity network |

## Operating Systems

| Service | Notes |
|---------|-------|
| [Debian](https://www.debian.org) | Static web content and package repositories via onion |
| [DivestOS](https://divestos.org) | Security and privacy-focused LineageOS fork |
| [Qubes OS](https://www.qubes-os.org) | Security-focused desktop operating system |
| [Whonix](https://www.whonix.org) | Debian-based security distribution designed for use with Tor |

## Search Engines

| Service | Notes |
|---------|-------|
| [Ahmia](https://ahmia.fi) | Clearnet search engine that indexes onion services |
| [Brave Search](https://search.brave.com) | Independent search engine by Brave Software |
| [DuckDuckGo](https://duckduckgo.com) | Privacy-focused search engine |
| [Kagi](https://kagi.com) | Ad-free, privacy-respecting search engine |
| [MetaGer](https://metager.org) | German privacy-focused metasearch engine |
| [Searx](https://searx.github.io/searx) | Open-source, self-hostable metasearch engine; individual instances use onion addresses |
| [Startpage.com](https://www.startpage.com) | Privacy-focused Google proxy search engine |

## Social Media and Forums

| Service | Notes |
|---------|-------|
| [Dread](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dread_(forum)) | Tor-hosted forum modeled on Reddit |
| [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com) | Official Facebook onion address |
| [Reddit](https://www.reddit.com) | Social news aggregation and discussion platform |

## Software

| Service | Notes |
|---------|-------|
| [Brave](https://brave.com) | Privacy-focused web browser |
| [F-Droid](https://f-droid.org) | Open-source Android app repository |
| [Guardian Project](https://guardianproject.info) | Develops privacy and security apps (Orbot, etc.) |
| [OnionShare](https://onionshare.org) | Open-source tool for sharing files, hosting sites, and chatting over Tor |

## Whistleblowing and Drop Sites

*These organizations operate SecureDrop or other onion-based submission systems for
sources and whistleblowers.*

| Organization | Notes |
|-------------|-------|
| [2600: The Hacker Quarterly](https://www.2600.com) | Long-running hacker magazine |
| [ABC News](https://abcnews.go.com) | US television news network |
| [Aftenposten](https://www.aftenposten.no) | Norwegian daily newspaper |
| [Al Jazeera Media Network](https://www.aljazeera.com) | Qatari international news network |
| [Bloomberg News](https://www.bloomberg.com/news) | Financial and business news |
| [CBC News](https://www.cbc.ca/news) | Canadian public broadcaster |
| [CNN International](https://edition.cnn.com) | US cable news network |
| [Dagbladet](https://www.dagbladet.no) | Norwegian tabloid newspaper |
| [Distributed Denial of Secrets](https://ddosecrets.com) | Transparency collective publishing hacked and leaked datasets |
| [Filtrala](https://filtrala.org) | Spanish whistleblowing initiative operated by Associated Whistleblowing Press |
| [Financial Times](https://www.ft.com) | Global business and financial newspaper |
| [Forbidden Stories](https://forbiddenstories.org) | Journalism network that continues the work of threatened reporters |
| [HuffPost](https://www.huffpost.com) | US digital news and blog platform |
| [Independent Media Center](https://www.indymedia.org) | Open-publishing news network |
| [Lawrence Lessig](https://lessig.org) | Legal scholar and political activist |
| [Ljost](https://ljost.is) | Icelandic whistleblowing initiative operated by Associated Whistleblowing Press |
| [New York Times](https://www.nytimes.com) | US national newspaper |
| [NRK](https://www.nrk.no) | Norwegian public broadcaster |
| [Politico](https://www.politico.com) | Political news and journalism |
| [ProPublica](https://www.propublica.org) | Investigative journalism nonprofit |
| [Reuters](https://www.reuters.com) | International news agency |
| [Süddeutsche Zeitung](https://www.sueddeutsche.de) | German national newspaper |
| [TechCrunch](https://techcrunch.com) | Technology news outlet |
| [The Globe and Mail](https://www.theglobeandmail.com) | Canadian national newspaper |
| [The Guardian](https://www.theguardian.com) | UK national newspaper |
| [The Intercept](https://theintercept.com) | Investigative journalism focused on national security |
| [The Markup](https://themarkup.org) | Data-driven investigative journalism on technology |
| [The New Yorker](https://www.newyorker.com) | US weekly magazine |
| [The Washington Post](https://www.washingtonpost.com) | US national newspaper |
| [Toronto Star](https://www.thestar.com) | Canadian daily newspaper |
| [TV 2 (Denmark)](https://tv2.dk) | Danish public broadcaster |
| [Vice Media](https://www.vice.com) | Digital media company |
| [Whistleblower Aid](https://whistlebloweraid.org) | Legal support organization for whistleblowers |
| [WildLeaks](https://www.wildleaks.org) | Wildlife-crime whistleblowing initiative operated by Elephant Action League |
